name: Inngest subject config read by id without profileId filter
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L3-01] update-vocabulary-retention reads subjects by id alone (no eq(subjects.profileId)), unlike sibling reads in the same file; config-only and same-profile-derived today, latent leak if expanded. Fix: add eq(subjects.profileId, profileId) to the WHERE.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: update-vocabulary-retention in apps/api/src/inngest/functions/session-completed.ts reads subjects with where eq(subjects.id, subjectId) only, even though profileId is available and sibling reads are profile-scoped. Variants: owned subjectId continues to process; missing subjectId continues to skip; subjectId not owned by event.profileId must skip and perform no retention update. Regression test: extend apps/api/src/inngest/functions/session-completed.test.ts update-vocabulary-retention coverage so the subject lookup includes profileId or a foreign subjectId fixture fails before the scoped WHERE and passes after.
